tool_attempts.result_summary:
[INFO] Initializing load test against http://staging.internal:8080
[INFO] Spawning worker processes

/opt/scripts/load-test.sh: fork: retry: Resource temporarily unavailable
/opt/scripts/load-test.sh:

final_response:
The load test script attempted to run but encountered a resource issue. The error indicates the system ran out of resources when trying to spawn worker processes (fork failures). This typically happens when:

1. The system is running low on available memory
2. The process limit has been reached
3. File descriptor limits are exceeded

The script did successfully initialize and target the staging environment at `http://staging.internal:8080`, but it failed when trying to create the necessary worke
